validation_results.name: API ticket/task regression
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api exec vitest run src/modules/ticket src/modules/task src/services/TicketService

gate_results.log_path: ticket assign/unassign/changePriority + task assignTo* now reject terminal entities

kpi_results.target: reject priority/assign/unassign on closed+archived; clamp SLA duration

definition_of_done_items.criterion: ticket+task terminal-state guards; property tests un-skipped

notes: Scope: QUAL-001 (5 ticket state-machine bugs — changePriority/assign/unassign now guard closed+terminal via isClosed||isTerminalStatus; resumeSla clamps negative pause duration) FULLY fixed. QUAL-002 terminal-linkage (RACE-PURE-M2, 3 tests) fixed via Task.assertLinkable(). 3 obsolete 'current broken behaviour' companion tests removed. DEFERRED: QUAL-002 RACE-PURE-09 (2 tests, complete-on-PENDING + changeStatus transition-table enforcement) — the VALID_TASK_TRANSITIONS table EXISTS, but enforcing it in changeStatus/complete tightens the contract (breaks the 'complete on PENDING succeeds' property + needs service-caller verification), so it is a separate focused change, tracked in the test file + this note. No regressions (domain 2750 + property 584 + api 218 all green).
